title: Iran Executes 3 Men, Including Teenage Wrestler Saleh Mohammadi
summary_full: The Iranian authorities accused the men of killing two police officers during anti-government protests in January. Human rights groups had raised concerns about the cases against them.
summary_public: The Iranian authorities accused the men of killing two police officers during anti-government protests in January. Human rights groups had raised concerns about the cases against them.
